utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). All 7 items appear; none are missing. Transportation has limited detail but includes a provider and cost; given the format, it qualifies.
